## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes (including `parity.test.js` — library and CLI `--json` output stay byte-identical)
- [ ] Zero runtime dependencies preserved (Node core modules only)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for parsing, surgery, or output-shape changes
- [ ] One topic per PR; commit subjects follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`, [DCO](https://developercertificate.org/))
